title: neanotis hirsuta var. glabricalycina
intro: Neanotis hirsuta var. glabricalycina, also known as the hairy neanotis or hairy forest neanotis, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, act as an anti-inflammatory, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Neanotis hirsuta var. glabricalycina include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease and stroke, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Neanotis hirsuta var. glabricalycina include infusions and decoctions made from the leaves and roots, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically in the form of ointments or creams.
